description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs apt-get update, apt-get install -y npm python3-yaml inkscape fonts-roboto-slab fonts-noto-core fonts-noto-cjk zopfli iso-codes, npm install -g svgo, pushd badge, ./1-translate-svg.py, ./2-optimize-svg.sh, ./3-export-png.sh, ./4-copy.sh, ./5-check.py, popd, mkdir public, and cp -r badge public/, then publishes the public directory as a Pages artifact. Add a reuse job that uses the fsfe/reuse:latest Docker image with an empty entrypoint and runs reuse lint. The pipeline has no global image, services, caches, or rules, and the pages job deploys to GitLab Pages.
